title: Phase 0.6: Permission Lifecycle Workflows & System Event Handlers
description:
Build the permission request and validation workflow using permission_handler. Properly request Camera and Storage permissions, handling denied, restricted, and permanently disabled scenarios. Incorporate Flutter WidgetsBindingObserver to manage app lifecycle changes (inactive, paused, resumed) and release camera resources cleanly.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Denying permissions shows a clear screen prompting users to open settings.
Backgrounding/resuming the app prints lifecycle events to console and updates state correctly.

title: Phase 0.5: Android Native Platform Bridge (MethodChannel & EventChannel)
description:
Establish native channel communications between Flutter (Dart) and Android Native (Kotlin).
- Setup a MethodChannel to handle commands (e.g., initialize camera, select shader, execute capture).
- Setup an EventChannel to push status updates from Android back to Flutter (e.g., active status, fps metrics, frame captured events).

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Flutter executes platform methods and receives data.
Native platform streams mock events (e.g. dummy frame rate numbers) that show up in Dart UI in real-time.

title: Phase 0.2: Navigation Router Configuration & Stub Screen Shells
description:
Set up the routing configuration using go_router. Create basic shell UI widgets for Splash Screen, Camera (Home) Screen, Gallery Screen, and Settings Screen.

Implement declarative routes:
- /splash (Initial screen, auto-navigates to /camera)
- /camera (Home screen with placeholders for shutter, preset carousel, flash button)
- /gallery (Media viewer placeholder)
- /settings (Preferences configuration placeholder)

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
The app launches into Splash and automatically redirects to Camera.
Basic navigation transitions between Camera, Gallery, and Settings work smoothly.
notes:
Implementasi navigasi Phase 0.2 selesai — siap review manual.

RINGKASAN PERUBAHAN:
1. lib/features/splash/view/splash_screen.dart — SplashScreen baru dengan icon kamera dan wordmark 'Rana', layar hitam, auto-redirect ke /camera setelah 1.2 detik
2. lib/core/widgets/main_shell.dart — Shell baru berisi NavigationBar persisten dengan 3 tab: Camera, Gallery, Settings
3. lib/core/router/app_router.dart — Route / menampilkan SplashScreen (initial location); /camera, /gallery, /settings dibungkus dalam StatefulShellRoute
4. lib/features/camera/view/camera_screen.dart — Tombol navigasi manual dihapus; layout disederhanakan menjadi placeholder shutter
5. test/navigation_test.dart — 4 test navigasi ditambahkan
6. test/widget_test.dart — diperbaiki untuk drain timer splash

flutter analyze: 0 issues
flutter test: 5/5 passed

PANDUAN TESTING MANUAL:
1. Jalankan: flutter run (dari /Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana)
2. Verifikasi Splash: App terbuka ke layar hitam dengan icon kamera dan tulisan 'RANA' di tengah selama ~1.2 detik
3. Auto-redirect: Setelah splash, app otomatis pindah ke Camera Screen — terlihat NavigationBar di bawah dengan 3 ikon (Camera, Gallery, Settings)
4. Tab Camera: Tab Camera aktif (ikon solid), placeholder shutter terlihat di layar
5. Tab Gallery: Tap ikon Gallery → berpindah ke Gallery Screen; tab aktif berubah
6. Tab Settings: Tap ikon Settings → berpindah ke Settings Screen; tab aktif berubah
7. Kembali ke Camera: Tap ikon Camera → kembali ke Camera Screen
8. Hot restart: Splash muncul lagi, lalu kembali ke Camera

title: Phase 0.1: Flutter Project Initialization, Directory Architecture & Lint Config
description:
Initialize the Flutter project in the root directory. Configure analysis options (linting rules), formatting rules, and set up a modular, feature-first directory architecture.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Flutter project compiles and runs on Android.
Linting rules (analysis_options.yaml) are strictly defined.
Folder structure is created with dummy readme placeholders.
notes:
Phase 0.1 selesai diimplementasikan dan siap untuk review manual.

RINGKASAN PERUBAHAN:
- Flutter project diinisialisasi dengan org com.rana.app, platform Android only
- Struktur folder modular (feature-first): lib/core/{router,theme,utils,widgets}, lib/features/{camera,gallery,settings}, lib/data/{models,sources}
- analysis_options.yaml dengan strict-casts, strict-inference, strict-raw-types dan lint rules lengkap (kompatibel Dart 3.11)
- go_router: named routes /camera, /gallery, /settings
- Stub screens: CameraScreen, GalleryScreen, SettingsScreen (placeholder Phase 0)
- AppLogger singleton menggunakan package logger
- pubspec.yaml: go_router, flutter_riverpod, riverpod_annotation, logger, permission_handler; asset dirs terdaftar
- WORKTREE.md: panduan git worktree untuk semua issue berikutnya
- flutter analyze: 0 issues; flutter test: 1/1 passed

PANDUAN REVIEW MANUAL:
1. cd /Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana
2. flutter run (pastikan Android device/emulator aktif)
3. Verifikasi app terbuka langsung ke Camera Screen (layar hitam dengan icon kamera dan 3 tombol bawah)
4. Tap ikon gallery (kiri) → pastikan berpindah ke Gallery Screen
5. Tap tombol back → kembali ke Camera Screen
6. Tap ikon settings (kanan) → pastikan berpindah ke Settings Screen
7. Tap tombol back → kembali ke Camera Screen
8. Rotate device → pastikan tidak crash

ELEMENT UI YANG PERLU DIVERIFIKASI:
- Camera Screen: ikon kamera putih di tengah, 3 tombol bawah (gallery, shutter, settings)
- Gallery Screen: AppBar 'Gallery' dengan back button, ikon foto di tengah
- Settings Screen: AppBar 'Settings' dengan back button, ikon settings di tengah

title: Phase 0.7: Core Logging, Exception Catcher & Global Error Screen
description:
Integrate a logger framework (like logger package) to format debug/error output. Set up a global exception catcher (runZonedGuarded or FlutterError.onError) to direct unhandled crashes away from default OS boundaries into a user-friendly, retro-themed Error Screen.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Custom error UI renders on throw exceptions.
Logs are cleanly captured with distinct severity tags (Debug, Warning, Error, Fatal).

title: Phase 0.4: State Management Integration & Camera State Mock Models
description:
Configure state management (Riverpod or Bloc). Model the core states required for the camera interface, including flash configuration, active lens (front/back), active preset, and capturing animation status. Build a mock service to test switching camera states.

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:
- PRD: docs/rana_prd.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/rana_prd.md)
- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
Core states are readable and writable using providers/blocs.
Interacting with placeholder buttons (e.g. Flash toggle) correctly updates app state and triggers corresponding UI updates.

title: Phase 0.3: Asset Pipeline & Directory Structure Setup
description:
Set up the directories and declare the asset pipeline in pubspec.yaml. We will skip a custom design/theme system for now (using basic default UI/UX) as focus is on developing core app functionality first.

Assets structure to configure:
- assets/presets/ (LUT textures, JSON parameters)
- assets/overlays/ (PNG borders, light leaks, dust layers)
- assets/stamps/ (TTF/OTF fonts for vintage timestamps)
- assets/icons/ (App icons)

IMPORTANT: Before starting, please read the following workspace documents to align on requirements and technical architecture:

- Research Report: docs/deep-research-report.md (file:///Users/apple/Programming/Projects/Personal/Rana/docs/deep-research-report.md)
acceptance_criteria:
The assets directories exist under ./assets.
Placeholder assets are registered in pubspec.yaml and load successfully.
